scripts.deploy:worker: echo 'Note: Cloud Run uses --allow-unauthenticated; auth is enforced by X-API-Key in app.' && cd worker && gcloud run deploy delivery-slip-worker --source . --region asia-northeast1 --memory 1Gi --timeout 300 --max-instances 1 --concurrency 1 --allow-unauthenticated
scripts.deploy: npm run deploy:gas && npm run deploy:worker
